title: Models Registry
description: JSON Schema for control-plane/policies/models.yaml - canonical logical model definitions

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in docs and dashboards

billing_name.description: Name used in New-API billing records

description.description: Brief description of the model's purpose and characteristics

upstream_model.description: Provider-specific model ID sent to the upstream API

risk_level.description: Determines ClewdR eligibility and routing tier

allowed_groups.description: User groups that may access this model

channel.description: New-API channel name (must match a key in channels.yaml)

route_policy.description: Bifrost routing rule name (must match a key in routing-rules.yaml)

unofficial_allowed.description: Whether ClewdR/unofficial providers may serve this model

caching_allowed.description: Whether Bifrost semantic caching may be used
